_comment: Allowlist of college IDs the synthesizer is permitted to use. INVARIANT: every entry MUST be present in the universities knowledge base (knowledge-base-manager-universities-v2/get-university). When adding a school here, first verify the KB has its profile — otherwise the synthesizer can pick it, scenarios will exercise compute_fit on it, and /compute-single-fit will return 404 (real run_20260505T033041Z_92fd32 hit this on university_of_chicago which was in the allowlist but missing from the KB). Use full canonical names; short aliases (e.g. 'mit', 'ucla') are folded by coverage._CANONICAL_ALIASES at dashboard-build time and must not be added here. Run scripts/verify-allowlist-kb.sh periodically to catch orphans.
